The '''Craeen system''' was a was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], within the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. It contained the [[Cinnabar Moon]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Craeen]].
